message:
bd-131: implement DDL generation from schema operations

Add DdlGenerator trait and implementations for SQLite, MySQL, and PostgreSQL.

- DdlGenerator trait with generate(), generate_all(), generate_rollback()
- SqliteDdlGenerator: handles limited ALTER TABLE (comments for unsupported ops)
- MysqlDdlGenerator: full ALTER TABLE support with MODIFY COLUMN
- PostgresDdlGenerator: full support with separate ALTER COLUMN statements
- Shared helpers for quoting, column defs, FK constraints, index generation
- 59 new unit tests across all modules

Files:
- crates/sqlmodel-schema/src/ddl/mod.rs (trait + shared helpers)
- crates/sqlmodel-schema/src/ddl/sqlite.rs
- crates/sqlmodel-schema/src/ddl/mysql.rs
- crates/sqlmodel-schema/src/ddl/postgres.rs

Unblocks bd-160 (migration file generator).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
